profile.summary: Final-year Computer Science Engineering student with hands-on experience building web applications and AI-powered products. Experienced with React, Next.js, Node.js, and Django, with a growing focus on AI agents and intelligent systems. Passionate about building practical software that solves real-world problems.

work: Explored AI technologies including Generative AI, LLMs, RAG pipelines, LangChain, LangGraph, and agentic AI workflows through hands-on experimentation.
Contributed to the development of a Student Management Portal used by faculties and administrators to conduct tests and review student performance.
Worked on both frontend and backend development.
Participated in feature planning and scrum meetings.
Fixed bugs, tested features, and maintained development tracking sheets.
Collaborated with team members and assisted other developers when needed.

projects.name: Student Management Portal
projects.description: A platform used by faculties to conduct tests and allow administrators like HOD, principal, and technical directors to review student performance.

projects.name: StartzyAI
projects.description: An AI-powered platform that helps startups validate ideas through market analysis and structured product planning.
contributions: Migrated frontend from React.js to Next.js
Built and tested multiple product features
Fixed bugs and maintained testing sheets
Participated in scrum meetings and product discussions

work: Developed server-side rendered cab booking websites.
Communicated with clients to understand requirements and implement requested features.
Worked on websites related to tours and travels and real estate services.
Handled deployment of applications on DigitalOcean.

projects.name: StartzyAI
projects.description: An AI-powered platform that guides startups from idea to market-ready product by automating stages such as prototype creation, feature planning, and customer feedback collection.
features: AI-driven questions to identify startup problems and opportunities
Analysis of similar apps to refine product features
AI-generated feature lists categorized as MVP, PMF, and backlog
External survey generation for collecting customer feedback
Automatic generation of business models, SWOT analysis, market size, and competitive analysis

career_goals.current_goal: Looking for an entry-level full-stack or software engineering role in the IT industry.
career_goals.future_goal: Aiming to work at leading technology companies such as Google, Amazon, or Microsoft within the next few years while continuing to develop expertise in AI-powered systems and software engineering.
